headline: Super vs Orchids — Personal AI Agents Compared

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs Orchids. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost.
site_brief.title: Super vs Orchids

summary: A fair, evidence‑based comparison for people evaluating Super and Orchids. Orchids explores messaging‑centric and experimental agent ideas, while Super is purpose‑built for durable computer‑use workflows — with a reusable computer-use cache that makes repeated work faster and cheaper over time. The page also situates both products within the wider agent landscape including Folk, Siri, ChatGPT, Gemini, and Grok.
